name: Stuffed Mushrooms with Crabmeat
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mushrooms: Remove and finely chop the mushroom stems.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the chopped mushroom stems, vegetable soup mix, crab meat, sour cream or yogurt, bread crumbs, dill, hot pepper sauce, and black pepper.
3. Arrange mushroom caps on a lightly greased baking sheet. Stuff each cap with the crabmeat mixture, then brush with butter.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F for 15 minutes or until tender.
5. Makes about 12 appetizers.
Make Ahead Directions:
Mushrooms can be partially prepared up to 1 day ahead. Simply prepare and stuff as above, cover, and refrigerate. To serve, brush with butter then bake as above.
